title: Default Server
description: Allow your playets to choose a default player which they will be teleported on join.
body:
# Default Server
_Let your players choose where they play !_

![Download on Modrith](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/available/modrinth/cozy.svg)
![Aviable for Velocity](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/supported/velocity/cozy.svg)
![Wont support Bungeecord](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/unsupported/bungeecord/cozy.svg)
![Wont support Waterfall](https://badges.penpow.dev/badges/unsupported/waterfall/cozy.svg)


DefaultServer is a Velocity plugin which allow you players to choose a default server

# Configuration
The configuration is quite simple and strateforward. Just input the servers you want the player to be able to choose, and do `/reloadserver`. That's it !

```yaml
# Sample configuration

aviables-servers:
  - smp
  - faction
```

This plugin is open source ! It's also the first one I made, so expect things not beening perfect

# Waterfall / Bungeecord support
## Waterfall
We will not support waterfall as it reach is end of life.
## Bungeecord
This would require a complete rewrite of the plugin, and it's my fitst plugin... So maybe, one yime, but not now
